channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: Supreme Court strikes down Trump’s sweeping tariffs, upending central plank of his economic agenda
item.description: President Donald Trump says he’s imposing a temporary global tariff of 10% after his far-reaching tariff regimen was struck down by the Supreme Court.

item.title: All truckers and bus drivers will be required to take commercial driver’s license tests in English
NASA targets March for first moon mission by Artemis astronauts after fueling test success
